intended_use: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease
intended_use_full: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease and Age>18
target_condition: left ventricular dysfunction; suspected cardiac disease
ground_truth: GLS measurements by Automated Functional Imaging (AFI, GE Healthcare) performed routinely in the echo lab
other_metrics: Correlation: 0.88 (GLS); Measurement Accuracy (Mean±1.96STD): -1.4% ± 3.93%; View Recognition Rate: 95% (4CH, 2CH, 3CH clips identified in 95% of examinations)
